name: Creamy Chicken & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat two tablespoons margarine.
Add chicken; cook for 10 minutes or until browned. Remove chicken from the skillet.
2. Reduce heat to medium. In the remaining margarine, cook mushrooms and onion with garlic
until the onions are tender and all liquid has evaporated, stirring often.
3. Stir in the soup, milk, and pepper; heat until boiling.
4. Return the chicken to the skillet. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until
the chicken is no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve with hot cooked noodles.
Serves 4.
From a Campbell's Soup Advertisement, October 1993 Reader's Digest.
